_comment: THE CHANGELOGS ARE FOR LATEST 26.05.05 VERSION ONLY, JUST EDIT THE VERSION AND TITLE
title: BitOS 26.05.04
changes: Removed the BitMusic widget and cleaned up the dashboard.
Added a smoother splash screen with proper app initialization handling.
Improved sidebar branding, spacing, and collapsed navigation behavior.
Fixed safe-area support so content no longer overlaps Android system bars.
Simplified wallpaper rendering for better stability and performance.
Added 8 new reactive wallpaper patterns including matrix, crt, and waves.
Introduced customizable section colors across the UI.
Added a section-colors settings panel with color picker and HEX input support.
Section color settings now save locally and sync through Firebase.
